name: Dr. Dabber Switch SiC Induction Cup
summary: Dabber Switc h SiC Induction Cup is a superior add-on that enriches the vaporisation process by offering robust terpene profiles for avid users.
description: Dabber Switc h SiC Induction Cup is a superior add-on that enriches the vaporisation process by offering robust terpene profiles for avid users. Additionally, the lightweight SiC insert is exceptionally durable. The high thermal conductivity of Silicon Carbide ensures the ability to achieve desired effects and ideal terpene profiles at lower temperatures, promoting terpene preservation and creating the dabbing experience. Dabber Switch SiC Induction Cup is hassle-free by using a warm cotton bud between dabs. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
